    "verify_material_markings"
  ],
  "findings": [
    "Staged gas piping materials are in sealed packaging with rating and specification markings turned away from view, preventing verification against the design drawings."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Unpack or rotate the staged piping materials to expose the manufacturer markings, ASTM standards, and pressure ratings for inspection before installation begins."
  ],
  "rationale": "The materials are staged but cannot be verified as compliant with the IFGC/NFPA 54 specifications because the rating labels and markings are obscured. Verification must occur before installation to prevent non-compliant materials from being installed.",
  "references": [
    "IFGC Section 301.3",
    "NFPA 54 Chapter 5"
  ]
}
